cssRules: .minimal-shell { min-height: 100vh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 240px minmax(0px, 1fr); background: rgb(9, 9, 11); color: rgb(203, 213, 225); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif; }
.minimal-sidebar { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); }

.minimal-nav-item { width: 100%; min-height: 42px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 0px 12px; border: 0px; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: rgb(148, 163, 184); font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-weight: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; font-language-override: inherit; font-size: 14px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms, color 160ms; }
.minimal-header { min-height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 0px 32px; }

.minimal-primary, .minimal-icon, .minimal-user { min-height: 38px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; border: 0px; border-radius: 999px; font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-weight: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; line-height: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; font-language-override: inherit; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; }
.minimal-primary { padding: 0px 16px; background: rgb(79, 70, 229); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 800; box-shadow: rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.22) 0px 12px 28px; }
.minimal-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.minimal-stat { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; transition: background 160ms; }

.minimal-ai-panel::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px 0px auto; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.6), transparent); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 160ms; }

.minimal-shell .welcome-panel, .minimal-shell .content-card, .minimal-shell .stats-card, .minimal-shell .ai-card, .minimal-shell .task-column, .minimal-shell .calendar-day, .minimal-shell .today-timeline, .minimal-shell .unscheduled-panel, .minimal-shell .drawer, .minimal-shell .create-modal { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); background: rgb(18, 18, 20); color: rgb(203, 213, 225); box-shadow: none; }
.minimal-shell .welcome-panel { background: radial-gradient(circle at 90% 10%, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.15), transparent 30%), rgb(18, 18, 20); }

.minimal-shell .welcome-panel h1, .minimal-shell .task-card-title h3, .minimal-shell .ai-recommend-list strong, .minimal-shell .kanban-card strong, .minimal-shell .drawer-field strong, .minimal-shell .empty-state strong { color: rgb(248, 250, 252); }

.minimal-shell .task-card, .minimal-shell .kanban-card, .minimal-shell .drawer-field, .minimal-shell .timeline-hour, .minimal-shell .task-table-row, .minimal-shell .ai-log-row { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); background: rgb(24, 24, 27); color: rgb(203, 213, 225); }
.minimal-shell .task-card p, .minimal-shell .task-meta, .minimal-shell .ai-recommend-list p, .minimal-shell .task-table-row p, .minimal-shell .drawer-field span { color: rgb(100, 116, 139); }
.minimal-shell input, .minimal-shell textarea, .minimal-shell select { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); background: rgb(24, 24, 27); color: rgb(226, 232, 240); }
.minimal-shell .ghost-button, .minimal-shell .icon-button { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); background: rgb(24, 24, 27); color: rgb(203, 213, 225); }

.minimal-shell-light .minimal-brand strong, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-hero h1, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-rate strong, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-panel-title.split, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-panel-title h2, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-stat strong, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-recommend-list strong, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-task-row strong, .minimal-shell-light .page-heading h1, .minimal-shell-light .section-title h2, .minimal-shell-light .drawer-header h2, .minimal-shell-light .task-card-title h3, .minimal-shell-light .kanban-card strong, .minimal-shell-light .drawer-field strong, .minimal-shell-light .empty-state strong, .minimal-shell-light .ai-reason-header strong { color: rgb(23, 32, 51); }

.minimal-shell-light .minimal-brand small, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-hero p, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-rate span, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-rate small, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-stat p, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-panel-title button, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-empty, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-empty p, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-recommend-list p, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-task-row p, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-task-row small, .minimal-shell-light .page-heading p, .minimal-shell-light .section-title p, .minimal-shell-light .drawer-description, .minimal-shell-light .empty-state p, .minimal-shell-light .task-card p, .minimal-shell-light .task-meta, .minimal-shell-light .ai-recommend-list p, .minimal-shell-light .task-table-row p, .minimal-shell-light .drawer-field span, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-popover p { color: rgb(102, 112, 133); }

.minimal-shell-light .minimal-search, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-user, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-popover, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-stat, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-panel, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-recommend-list button, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-task-row, .minimal-shell-light .welcome-panel, .minimal-shell-light .content-card, .minimal-shell-light .stats-card, .minimal-shell-light .ai-card, .minimal-shell-light .task-column, .minimal-shell-light .calendar-day, .minimal-shell-light .today-timeline, .minimal-shell-light .unscheduled-panel, .minimal-shell-light .overdue-list, .minimal-shell-light .drawer, .minimal-shell-light .create-modal, .minimal-shell-light .task-card, .minimal-shell-light .kanban-card, .minimal-shell-light .drawer-field, .minimal-shell-light .timeline-hour, .minimal-shell-light .task-table-row, .minimal-shell-light .ai-log-row, .minimal-shell-light .mobile-task-card, .minimal-shell-light .task-table, .minimal-shell-light .filter-search, .minimal-shell-light .row-actions button, .minimal-shell-light .row-menu, .minimal-shell-light .table-footer button { border-color: rgb(228, 231, 236); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(23, 32, 51); }

.minimal-shell-light .minimal-search input, .minimal-shell-light input, .minimal-shell-light textarea, .minimal-shell-light select, .minimal-shell-light .ai-suggest-grid input, .minimal-shell-light .ai-suggest-grid textarea, .minimal-shell-light .settings-form input { border-color: rgb(228, 231, 236); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(23, 32, 51); }

.minimal-shell-light .minimal-icon, .minimal-shell-light .ghost-button, .minimal-shell-light .icon-button, .minimal-shell-light .mobile-card-more, .minimal-shell-light .mobile-quick-actions button { border-color: rgb(228, 231, 236); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(102, 112, 133); }

.minimal-shell-light .minimal-stat:hover, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-user:hover, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-recommend-list button:hover, .minimal-shell-light .minimal-task-row:hover, .minimal-shell-light .task-table tbody tr:hover, .minimal-shell-light .row-menu button:hover, .minimal-shell-light .mobile-task-card:active { background: rgb(248, 250, 252); }
.welcome-panel, .content-card, .stats-card, .ai-card { border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 18px; background: var(--surface); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }
.stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.stats-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; min-height: 112px; padding: 18px; }
.stats-card > span { width: 44px; height: 44px; display: grid; place-items: center; flex: 0 0 auto; border-radius: 14px; }
.section-title, .page-heading, .drawer-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; }

.task-card { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 34px minmax(0px, 1fr); gap: 12px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--surface); transition: transform 160ms, border-color 160ms, box-shadow 160ms; }
.task-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: var(--line-strong); box-shadow: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08) 0px 12px 24px; }
.task-check { width: 28px; height: 28px; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 2px solid var(--line-strong); border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }
.task-card-title { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px; }

.filter-search input, .filter-bar select, .board-toolbar select, .create-modal input, .create-modal textarea, .create-modal select { width: 100%; min-height: 42px; height: 42px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); outline: none; }
.filter-bar select, .board-toolbar select, .create-modal input, .create-modal textarea, .create-modal select { padding: 9px 12px; }
.task-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px; }
.task-table { width: 100%; min-width: 900px; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed; background: var(--surface); }
.task-table th, .task-table td { padding: 13px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; }
.kanban-board { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.mobile-task-card { display: grid; gap: 12px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--surface); }
.mobile-task-card p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; overflow-wrap: anywhere; }
.kanban-card { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 14px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); text-align: left; }
.kanban-card > div:first-child { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; }
.calendar-controls, .range-tabs { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; align-self: start; gap: 8px; }

.calendar-controls button, .range-tabs button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 0 0 auto; height: 38px; min-height: 38px; padding: 0px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 10px; background: var(--surface); color: var(--muted); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }
.calendar-controls button.active, .range-tabs button.active { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 40%, var(--line)); background: var(--primary-soft); color: var(--primary); }
.calendar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, minmax(0px, 1fr)); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; background: var(--surface); }
.calendar-day { min-height: 220px; display: grid; align-content: start; gap: 8px; padding: 14px; border-right: 1px solid var(--line); }
.calendar-day button { display: grid; gap: 3px; padding: 8px; border: 0px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--primary-soft); color: var(--primary); text-align: left; font-weight: 800; }
.calendar-day button span, .calendar-day p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; }
.stats-panels { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0px, 1.3fr) minmax(260px, 0.7fr); gap: 16px; }

.drawer { position: fixed; inset: 0px 0px 0px auto; z-index: 120; width: min(460px, 100vw); display: grid; align-content: start; gap: 18px; padding: 22px; border-left: 1px solid var(--line); background: var(--surface); box-shadow: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12) -16px 0px 38px; overflow: auto; animation: drawerSlideIn 200ms var(--ease-modal) forwards; }
.drawer-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--surface-soft); }

.modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 130; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: 18px; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.38); animation: fadeIn var(--duration-base) var(--ease-quick) forwards; }

.create-modal { width: min(620px, 100%); max-height: calc(-36px + 100vh); display: grid; gap: 14px; padding: 22px; border-radius: 18px; background: var(--surface); box-shadow: var(--shadow); overflow: auto; animation: modalSlideUp var(--duration-base) var(--ease-modal) forwards; }
